name: Vanilla Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream butter until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugars, creaming well until blended.
4. Beat in vanilla extract and egg.
5. Stir together flour, salt, and baking soda.
6. Add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture, blending well.
7. Stir in white chocolate chips, nuts, and coconut.
8. Drop by level tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake for about 12 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Remove from oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.
